contract diseases, will trouble others, be inimical to relatives, crooked, be kingly in his mid-life
and will enjoy growing pleasures.
9-10. SATURN IN LEO.
If Saturn occupies Leo, one will be interested in writing and reading, be skilful, be disdained,
devoid of virtues and wife, will live by servitude, be devoid of his own men and happiness, be
interested in doing base acts, ill-tempered, be mad with (undue) desires, will carry loads, will
toil hard and will have a wrinkled body.
11-12. SATURN IN VIRGO.
If Saturn occupies Virgo at birth the subject will resemble a eunuch, be very crafty, will depend on
others for food, be addicted to prostitutes, will have a few friends, be unacquainted with arts,
be desirous of indulging in ugly acts, will possess sons and wealth, be indolent, helpful to
others, will intent upon spoiling virgins and be cautious in his actions.
13-14. Saturn posited in Libra at birth
